data.description:
## Continuous Monitoring and Observability

Deploying code is only half the battle; knowing how it behaves in the wild is the other. Observability involves instrumenting systems with logs, metrics, and traces to understand their internal states.

**The Impact:** It drastically reduces Mean Time to Recovery (MTTR) by allowing teams to pinpoint and fix the root cause of production failures quickly.

## Scope

Integrate observability considerations into the preplanning and implementation-plan workflows so that logging, metrics, and tracing are planned and implemented as first-class concerns alongside feature code — not bolted on after deployment. Preplanning should generate stories that include observability requirements, and implementation-plan should produce tasks that cover instrumentation alongside functional implementation.
data.title: integrate observability into plan review
